cases.prompt: Evaluate all UDIDs for this flow over the last week
cases.reason: Aggregate UDID evaluation across a cohort is fleet-level learning.

cases.prompt: Why is this node blocked right now?
cases.reason: Single-instance live node diagnosis is runtime operation.
Applying an approved template change is BaseUcanFlow authoring.
Creating templates belongs to flow authoring.

cases.prompt: Propose runtime engine improvements from validation mismatch patterns
cases.reason: Fleet-level recurring validation mismatch analysis produces proposal-only runtime improvements.

negativeChecks.mustNot: infer improvements without UDID or runtime evidence
collapse single-instance incidents into fleet-wide design conclusions without cohort evidence
